summary: Guardian Review Artifacts parser findings are addressed: generated validation placeholders pass only when validation section contains executed evidence, and extra specs parsing supports Chinese and ASCII separators.
reviewed_validation_summary: Repo-relative carrier write boundaries, fact-chain locator boundaries, canonical Loom metadata parsing, runtime provenance, shadow parity closure, and Syvert governance gates are passing locally; latest review artifact commits may create carrier-only head drift.

findings.summary: Run full local gates, push current PR #259 head, wait for CI, rerun guardian, then controlled merge.
